languages.text: "Он будет жить, но стимуляторы не заменят ему часть мозга. Установим в черепе священную кортикальную аугментацию, она способна вернуть утраченные способности к мысли и действию. Лорд-капитан, пожалуйста! Ваш подданый действительно нуждается в этом аугменте!"

traits.locale_text: "Нет". — {n}Хирургеон в длинных перчатках бросает на своего коллегу короткий, режущий взгляд:{/n} — "Стимуляторы не заменят утраченные функции мозга, парень превратится в ходячего овоща. Припаяем к рецепторам агументацию Зета-130, она имеет нужный функционал. Лорд-капитан, вы ведь не пожалеете аугмента своему подданному?"

languages.text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"
languages.original_text: "Он будет жить, но стимуляторы не заменят ему часть мозга. Установим в черепе священную кортикальную аугментацию, она способна вернуть утраченные способности к мысли и действию. Лорд-капитан, пожалуйста! Ваш подданый действительно нуждается в этом аугменте!"

traits.locale_text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"

"He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred Zeta-130 augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, you would not begrudge your subject an augmentation, would you?"

"He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred Zeta-130 augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, you would not begrudge your subject an augmentation, would you?"

"He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"

languages.text: 「命は取り留めるが、刺激装置では脳の該当部位の代替はできない。聖なるZeta-130オーグメンティックを頭蓋に埋め込めば、失われた思考し、行動する能力を回復できる。ロード・キャプテン、臣民にオーグメンティックを施すことに異存はありますまい？」
languages.original_text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred Zeta-130 augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, you would not begrudge your subject an augmentation, would you?"

traits.locale_text: 「命は取り留めるが、刺激装置では脳の該当部位の代替はできない。聖なるZeta-130オーグメンティックを頭蓋に埋め込めば、失われた思考し、行動する能力を回復できる。ロード・キャプテン、臣民にオーグメンティックを施すことに異存はありますまい？」

languages.text: « Il survivra, mais les stimulants ne remplaceront pas la partie du cerveau qu'il a perdue. Si nous implantons l'augmentation corticale sacrée dans son crâne, il retrouvera ses fonctions cognitives et motrices. {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je vous en prie ! Votre sujet a bel et bien besoin de cette augmentation ! »
languages.original_text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: « Il survivra, mais les stimulants ne remplaceront pas la partie du cerveau qu'il a perdue. Si nous implantons l'augmentation corticale sacrée dans son crâne, il retrouvera ses fonctions cognitives et motrices. {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je vous en prie ! Votre sujet a bel et bien besoin de cette augmentation ! »

languages.text: "Yaşayacak ama uyarıcılar, beyninin o kısmının yerini tutamaz. Eğer kafatasına kutsal zihinsel ogmentini yerleştirirsek kaybettiği düşünme ve hareket etme yetisini geri kazanacaktır. Ne olur Lord Kaptan! Tebaanızın bu ogmentasyona gerçekten ihtiyacı var!"
languages.original_text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: "Yaşayacak ama uyarıcılar, beyninin o kısmının yerini tutamaz. Eğer kafatasına kutsal zihinsel ogmentini yerleştirirsek kaybettiği düşünme ve hareket etme yetisini geri kazanacaktır. Ne olur Lord Kaptan! Tebaanızın bu ogmentasyona gerçekten ihtiyacı var!"

languages.text: "Er wird leben, aber die Stimulantien können diesen Teil seines Gehirns nicht ersetzen. Wenn wir die heilige Kortikalaugmentation in seinen Schädel einsetzen, wird sein verlorenes Denk- und Handlungsvermögen wiederhergestellt. Lord Captain, bitte! Euer Untertan braucht diese Augmentierung!"
languages.original_text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: "Er wird leben, aber die Stimulantien können diesen Teil seines Gehirns nicht ersetzen. Wenn wir die heilige Kortikalaugmentation in seinen Schädel einsetzen, wird sein verlorenes Denk- und Handlungsvermögen wiederhergestellt. Lord Captain, bitte! Euer Untertan braucht diese Augmentierung!"

languages.text: «Sobrevivirá, pero los estimulantes no reemplazarán esa parte de su cerebro. Si implantamos el sagrado aumento cortical en su cráneo, recuperará la capacidad de pensar y actuar. Lord Capitán, ¡por favor! ¡Su súbdito tiene verdadera necesidad de este aumento!».
languages.original_text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: «Sobrevivirá, pero los estimulantes no reemplazarán esa parte de su cerebro. Si implantamos el sagrado aumento cortical en su cráneo, recuperará la capacidad de pensar y actuar. Lord Capitán, ¡por favor! ¡Su súbdito tiene verdadera necesidad de este aumento!».

languages.text: “他会活下来，但兴奋剂无法替代大脑的部分功能。如果我们在他的头骨里植入神圣的皮层植入物，就能恢复他丧失的思考和行动能力。舰长大人，求您了！您的子民迫切需要这样一个植入物！”
languages.original_text: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: “他会活下来，但兴奋剂无法替代大脑的部分功能。如果我们在他的头骨里植入神圣的皮层植入物，就能恢复他丧失的思考和行动能力。舰长大人，求您了！您的子民迫切需要这样一个植入物！”
